text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash has scheduled time to hang out with
Tosen Jordan after our outing today.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
So, like, what're we doing today? You haven't
told me anything sooo... are we winging it?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Of course not. I have a trip to an
"Umastagrammable" cafe planned for us.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Wait, are you for real?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Omigosh. This place is built for Umastagram.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Heh... I never thought you'd invite me to a place
like this.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, remember how shook you were when I
randomly suggested we go to karaoke for
starters?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...What are you trying to imply? Could you please
be more direct?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I wasn't trying to imply anything! I was just
thinking how we gotta take a selfie to
commemorate this event.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Is that another new Japanese custom I have yet to
learn about?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: It sure is. It's, like, the current forerunner of trends, and right now, I feel like takin' a pic together!
choice_data_list: I can take one for you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
No, that's all right. You should join us. Let's
commemorate the day together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I appreciate you joining us today. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'd assumed an "Umastagrammable" location was
merely photogenic, but the cafe had a liveliness
that exceeded my expectations. Furthermore...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: The experience was delightful.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
To think I could be moved to this extent by a
single group photo is bewildering, to be honest.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Wait, hold up. Does this mean you've gotten used to trends enough to actually enjoy them?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
"Gotten used to?" No. If I were to put a word to
this feeling, it would be...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
"Familiar," I believe. They feel more familiar to
me now.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I still have a lot to learn, but I have come to enjoy
discovering all of these new experiences.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It helps that I have someone supportive by my
side.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Aww, you guys... This is low-key kinda emotional.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Hm? I've never heard "low-key" used in such a
way... I've discovered yet another term that's not
in my vocabulary.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I suspect this will happen again in the future, so I
must find an efficient way to learn new words.
choice_data_list: Maybe try solely speaking Japanese for a while.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I could do that, especially since Jordan said
she knows of forerunner trends.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Jordan. I hope you'll take me under your wing.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Judging by our past conversations, I believe I can
learn all the terms and phrases I don't know by
shadowing you for six days.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: For real?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you've gotta help me out here! She won't
leave me alone!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I have only completed 60 percent of my
objective. I shall not relent until I, too, have
achieved trendsetter status.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Eishin Flash is adjusting well to life at the
academy.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That's right. It's just as the hostess of the inn
taught me—there is no need to rush.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It seems I must try to embrace the concept of
"wabi-sabi" more fully.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Wabi what now? Is that related to wasabi or
something?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I spy Eishin Flash meditating
next to Grass Wonder on campus.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Inhale... exhale...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You're doing great. Now, let your mind relax
further still...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: You should be able to open your mind's eye soon.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I sense it all... The wind, the soil... No, the world...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... This feeling is sublime.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Eishin Flash has not only adjusted to
living in Japan, but on Earth as a whole...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: For reals? But like, what if her mom calls?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
My parents have their hands full with the bakery. I
doubt I'll be receiving any unexpected calls from
them.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Flash, you're out of breath! Are you okay?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I-it's nothing... I merely... had a call with my
parents...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huh? How'd a phone call wind you so much?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
My parents are not particularly adept in
Japanese, so I communicated via gestures using
video chat... for three hours.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Th-three hours?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...I have learned the value of doing everything in
moderation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash then devotes herself to adjusting to
life in Japan... while using an appropriate amount
of German.
